targets.expr: sum by(deployment_name, bjorn2scan_version, deployment_type, deployment_console, grype_db_built, deployment_uuid) (last_over_time(bjorn2scan_deployment{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="Critical"}[$staleness_window]) > 0) / sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="High"}[$staleness_window]) > 0) / sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="Medium"}[$staleness_window]) > 0) / sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="Low"}[$staleness_window]) > 0) / sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="Unknown"}[$staleness_window]) > 0) / sum by (namespace)(last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

sum by(full_image_id) (
	label_join(
		last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="Critical"}[$staleness_window]) > 0,
		"full_image_id",
		".",
		"image_reference",
		"image_digest"
	)
) / sum by(full_image_id) (
	label_join(
	last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0,
		"full_image_id",
		".",
		"image_reference",
		"image_digest"
	)
)

sum by(full_image_id) (
	label_join(
		last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_vulnerability{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace", severity="High"}[$staleness_window]) > 0,

sum by(deployment_name, namespace, pod, container, deployment_uuid_namespace_pod_container) (last_over_time(bjorn2scan_image_scanned{deployment_uuid=~"$deployment_uuid", namespace=~"$namespace"}[$staleness_window]) > 0)

list.description: Look-back window for last_over_time(). Set it above the slowest push interval (agents push every 15m, K8s every 5m).
list.label: Staleness window
list.name: staleness_window
